free_text: Alpha-gamma angular correlation studies of the
Silicon target (1.25 mg/cm2), prepared by vacuum
evaporation of natural silicon onto a thin copper
backing; backing subsequently removed with a copper
Scattered alpha particles detected with a Hughes
Gamma rays detected with a Harshaw NaI(Tl) crystal
Data given as number of coincidence counts.
